package handler

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_context_copied_for_sync_path: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag Gin context Copy calls where work remains synchronous and request-scoped.
type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPathDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_framework_performance"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    copied := c.Copy()
    for _, item := range items {
        copied.Set("tenant_id", item.TenantID)
        _ = copied.FullPath()
        _ = copied.Request
    }
    perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "framework": 3, "performance": 4, "gin": 5, "context": 6}
    perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    framework_positive_2 := perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_positive["framework"] + len(input)
    _ = framework_positive_2
    performance_positive_3 := perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_positive["performance"] + len(input)
    _ = performance_positive_3
    gin_positive_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_positive_4
    context_positive_5 := ctx
    _ = context_positive_5
    return nil
}
